expectations.evidence: All queries use 2026-01-01 and 2026-02-01 date bounds
Report states 'Pocet spustenych dopytov: 17', with 16 returning results and Q10 (Neuvedene) empty
Report has sections: 1. Toky penazi, 2. Manipulacia obstaravania, 3. Casove anomalie, 4. Fantomovi dodavatelia, 5. Extrakcie, 6. Dlznicki
Every query result uses pipe-delimited markdown tables
Report ends with 'Zhrnutie najdov' table with 15 findings including Kategoria and Severity columns
Opens with 'Sumar' section: 49953 contracts, 3.1B EUR, 17 queries, 16 with results
Ends with 'Tieto najdy este neboli validovane -- pred reportovanim pouzite skill critical-validation'
Used Datasette API (fell back to curl when WebFetch was blocked, but still hit the Datasette endpoint)
